title: BreadFlap Halal
description: A bitter, flaky Russian dish featuring bread and dumplings that is halal-friendly.

ingredients.name: bitter ingredients for taste (e.g. coffee, cocoa powder)

instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine flour and baking powder with salt.
Gradually add cold water to form a smooth dough. Knead briefly until it is firm but not stiff.
Cover the dough with plastic wrap and let rest for about 15 minutes.
Divide the dough into small portions and shape them into balls or flat discs as needed.
Place dumplings on top of the bread, ensuring proper layering. Add bitter ingredients evenly among layers if desired.
Gently press down to compact the mixture and seal the edges with a bit of extra dough.
Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Place layered bread-flap on baking sheet and bake for about 25-30 minutes or until golden brown.
Remove from oven, let cool slightly before serving.
